description: A customer claims they were overcharged for a public EV charging session.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the charging session details using the customer's account ID and the date of the session.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the session record showing start time, end time, and kWh delivered.

nodes.task_description: Verify the pricing rate applied during the session against the published rates for that charger and time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct time-of-use rate was applied.

nodes.task_description: Explain the charges to the customer, breaking down the cost based on energy consumed and any session fees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the calculation of the final bill.
